Recruitment Privacy Notice

I've read the Privacy Notice below and consent to the processing for Open Application - Netherlands of my data as part of my job application.

I agree that my personal information transmitted via this form is only used for the processing of recruitment purposes by Telespazio. The information might be transmitted to third parties and will be automatically removed from our database, in accordance with our Privacy Policy.
